name: Wild Rice Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly wash the wild rice in a bowl and drain it using a strainer.
2. In a buttered 2-quart casserole or baking dish, mix the washed wild rice, celery, green peppers, water, chicken bouillon granules, and salt.
3. Skin and halve the chicken breasts, then place them on top of the rice mixture.
4. Brush the chicken with soy sauce.
5. Cover the dish and bake in a 350-degree oven for 1 1/2 hours or until the wild rice is tender.
